name: Berry Trifle
recipeIngredient: 1/2 angel food cake, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine boiling water and gelatin; stir until gelatin dissolves (about 2 minutes). Add cold water, stirring until slightly thickened.
2. Stir in bananas and blueberry pie filling; set aside.
3. Place cake cubes in a 13 x 9-inch pan. Drizzle orange juice over cake cubes and toss well.
4. Spoon the gelatin mixture over the cake cubes and cover. Chill for 30 minutes in the freezer.
5. Meanwhile, prepare vanilla pudding according to package directions, using 2 1/2 cups of skim milk.
6. Fold whipped topping into the vanilla pudding and spread over the gelatin mixture.
